title: Company Names Tribunal decision: AMC Agriculture Ltd
body: "Application number 5232  Applicant The Agricultural Mortgage Corporation Plc objected to the name used by AMC Agriculture Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 July 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of AMC Agriculture Ltd is changed to 15845255, Ltd. "
